info.title: SUN.IO MCP Optimization Overlay
info.description: Sample overlay for improving MCP tool intent and parameter constraints for selected SUN.IO endpoints.

update.description: SUN.IO (also called SUNSWAP) OpenAPI spec with MCP-oriented descriptions and constraints for higher tool-selection accuracy.

x-mcp.name: sunSwapGetPools
x-mcp.description: Use this when user asks for SUNSWAP/SUN.IO pool list, pool ranking, or pool detail lookup by token/pool address.

update.description: Fetch SUN.IO (SUNSWAP) pool list/details by pool address, token address, or protocol. Prefer this for pool discovery and ranking use cases.

x-mcp.name: sunSwapGetTokenPrice
x-mcp.description: Use this when user asks for SUNSWAP/SUN.IO token price or quote by symbol/address.

update.description: Get latest token prices on SUN.IO (SUNSWAP). Supports batch lookup by comma-separated token symbols or addresses.
Farming transaction type filter on SUNSWAP/SUN.IO.
Fetch SUN.IO (SUNSWAP) farming transaction history including stake/unstake/lock/unlock/claim actions.
